problems.diagnostic: named thing must be an expression with a type
problems.cause: AGREE assumes/guarantees reference port names directly, but AGREE requires expressions with types; port names are not valid expressions in this context
problems.minimal_edit: Remove the assume and guarantee statements from the component type annex and place them in the implementation annex with proper assignments

executor_steps: Move the assume and guarantee statements from the ACCELERO component type annex to the ACCELERO.IMPL implementation annex
Replace the direct port references with assignment statements in the implementation annex
Ensure the implementation annex contains only valid AGREE constructs for implementation scope
